title: 视频封面界面图
description: An anime-style YouTube stream thumbnail featuring a cheerful female VTuber. She has long {argument name="hair color" default="pink with light blue inner highlights"} hair, blue eyes, and wears black and white cat-ear hea
prompt_raw: An anime-style YouTube stream thumbnail featuring a cheerful female VTuber. She has long {argument name="hair color" default="pink with light blue inner highlights"} hair, blue eyes, and wears black and white cat-ear headphones with a boom mic. She wears a white collared shirt with a black and pink star ribbon and a black choker, smiling with one hand near her chin. The background is a gaming room with {argument name="room lighting" default="purple and blue neon"} lighting, showing a desk equipped with 1 white keyboard, 1 mug, 1 glowing cat figure, 1 game controller, and 1 streaming microphone. The left side features large, bold, pop-art Japanese typography: a bright pink top word "{argument name="main text line 1" default="雑談"}" and a bright blue bottom word "{argument name="main text line 2" default="配信"}". Below is a pink banner reading "{argument name="subtitle text" default="今夜もゆるっとトーク!"}". A red "LIVE" badge sits in the top left. Floating speech bubbles, stars, and hearts decorate the composition.
prompt_preview: An anime-style YouTube stream thumbnail featuring a cheerful female VTuber. She has long {argument name="hair color" default="pink with light blue inner highlights"} hair, blue eyes, and wears black and white cat-ear hea
prompt_display_cn:
案例「hair color」属于UI/界面设计。这是一张 UI/界面设计类案例，重点在界面组件、信息层级、按钮、卡片、导航、状态栏和交互元素的完整呈现。适合改成游戏 UI、App 界面、网页控制台、直播界面、品牌产品界面或 UI Kit。

原始提示词要点：这条案例原文以英文描述画面，需要转成中文展示版。它的主要内容包括：An anime-风格 YouTube stream thumbnail featuring a cheerful female VTuber. She has long 【hair color：pink with 光线 blue inner high光线s】 hair, blue eyes, and wears black and white cat-ear headphones with a boom mic. She wears a white collared shirt with a black and pink star ribbon and a black choker, smiling with one hand near her chin. The 背景 is a gaming room with 【room 光线ing：purple and blue neon】 光线ing, showing a desk equipped with 1 white keyboard, 1 mug, 1 glowing cat figure, 1 game controller, and 1 streaming microphone. The left side features large, bold, pop-art Japanese 字体排版: a bright pink top word "【main text line 1：雑談】" and a bright blue bottom word "【main text line 2：配信】". Below is a pink banner reading "【sub标题 text：今夜もゆるっとトーク!】". A red "LIVE" badge sits in the top left. Floating speech bubbles, stars, and hearts decorate the composition.
prompt_template_cn:
设计一张【产品/应用名称】的【界面类型】UI 画面。

界面主题：
这是一个面向【目标用户】的【应用场景】界面，核心功能是【核心功能】。

整体风格：
采用【视觉风格】，主色调为【主色调】，材质/质感为【材质效果】，整体保持专业、清晰、统一。

界面结构：
画面包含【顶部区域】、【主内容区域】、【侧边栏/导航区】、【底部工具栏】等部分。各区域之间层级清楚，留白合理。

组件内容：
加入【按钮】、【卡片】、【图标】、【输入框】、【状态标签】、【数据/文字信息】等 UI 元素。关键文字包括：【界面文字】。

展示要求：
像真实可上线产品界面或高质量 UI Kit，不要像随意拼贴。文字清晰，图标统一，边距、圆角、阴影和对齐关系精致。

输出比例：
画面比例为【画面比例】。
